narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Continuous demand for AI-capable hardware and software is driving significant growth in semiconductor and cloud-based companies.

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: Strong clinical results and high market demand for weight-loss drugs continue to drive momentum for pharmaceutical leaders.

narratives.name: Energy and Inflationary Pressure
narratives.thesis: Rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions are providing a tailwind for energy producers while weighing on broader equity indices and gold.

narratives.name: Financial Sector Resilience
narratives.thesis: Financial institutions and payment networks are demonstrating strength and resilience despite macroeconomic volatility.

narratives.name: Crypto and Meme Volatility
narratives.thesis: Speculative interest in digital assets and meme-driven stocks continues to drive market volatility and potential upside.

narratives.name: Tech Sector Pullback
narratives.thesis: Macroeconomic concerns regarding inflation and rising oil prices are causing a broad-based pullback in technology stocks.
